name: Chicken Soup with Lemon and Ginger (Kai Tom Khing)
recipeIngredient: 2 small Green chilies, sliced into rings
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a saucepan or wok and fry the garlic until soft but not brown.
2. Add the chicken and stir-fry for 5 minutes.
3. Cool the chicken slightly, then add water and mushrooms. Bring to a boil and simmer for 10 minutes.
4. Stir in the lemon juice. Cover and cook gently for another 10 minutes.
5. Add the chilies, spring onions, and ginger. Remove from heat.
6. Sprinkle with coriander leaves before serving.
